description: Section-first navigation index for Claude OS. Use this before brute-reading documentation files.

sections.title: Global Operating Mandate
sections.purpose: Primary global policy loaded by Claude Code sessions.

sections.title: Navigation Map
sections.purpose: Human and agent map of repo components, counts, status, and where to go next.

sections.title: Aggregate OS Health
sections.purpose: Single health entrypoint for manifest, skills, docs, syntax, bootstrap, and Bash checks.

sections.title: Bootstrap Manifest Source of Truth
sections.purpose: Canonical counts, skill categories, script list, and bootstrap critical paths.

sections.title: Canonical Skills
sections.purpose: Skill definitions copied into project scaffolds as .claude/skills artifacts.

sections.title: Skills handbook
sections.purpose: Manifest-governed skills: canonical paths, sync, drift, validation profiles, maturity, and risk.

sections.title: Operational playbooks
sections.purpose: Release, incident, migration, bootstrap, docs contract, and adapter drift runbooks validated by verify-playbooks.ps1.

sections.title: Command recipes
sections.purpose: Short copy-paste sequences for validate, init, skills, drift, and release; validated by verify-recipes.ps1.

sections.title: Windows Project Bootstrap
sections.purpose: Creates project .claude tree, installs commands, agents, skills, scripts, policies, local state, and validates critical paths.

sections.title: Windows Global Install
sections.purpose: Installs global Claude OS files into ~/.claude on Windows.

sections.title: Unix Global Install
sections.purpose: Installs global Claude OS files into ~/.claude on Unix-like systems.

sections.title: Manifest Integrity Verifier
sections.purpose: Fails on repo tree, bootstrap scripts, unsafe paths, duplicates, or critical path drift.

sections.title: Skill Definition Verifier
sections.purpose: Validates source/skills frontmatter, categories, names, counts, and safe links.

sections.title: Documentation Drift Verifier
sections.purpose: Fails when INDEX.md summaries diverge from bootstrap-manifest.json.

sections.title: Slash Commands
sections.purpose: User-invocable Claude commands for session start/end, classification, audits, invariants, incidents, and release readiness.

sections.title: Specialist Agents
sections.purpose: Role definitions for architecture, security, release, reliability, and QA work.

sections.title: Lifecycle Hook Scripts
sections.purpose: Bash scripts for preflight, telemetry, risk, invariants, coordination, epistemic checks, learning, and context topology.

sections.title: Operating Policies
sections.purpose: Binding rules for model selection, operating modes, production safety, token economy, rollback, and reporting.

sections.title: Deprecation policy
sections.purpose: deprecation-manifest.json registry, strict enforcement surfaces, and optional upstream fork comparison.

sections.title: Reusable Prompts
sections.purpose: Reusable task prompts for session start, phase close, architecture review, release review, and incident triage.

sections.title: Invariant Engine Bundles
sections.purpose: TypeScript-derived .cjs bundles for invariant verification, semantic diff, and contract delta simulation.

sections.title: Operator Quickstart
sections.purpose: Five-minute Windows path, Linux/CI strict path, project bootstrap, and troubleshooting Git/Bash/PowerShell.

sections.title: Validation Profiles and Status Taxonomy
sections.purpose: Profiles (quick/standard/strict), JSON envelopes, false-green avoidance, and release gates.

sections.title: Platform compatibility matrix
sections.purpose: Windows PS 5.1 vs pwsh, Linux/macOS pwsh, Bash/Git Bash/WSL, GitHub Actions; compatibility-manifest.json and verify-compatibility.ps1.

sections.title: Install, init, update, rollback, and project lifecycle
sections.purpose: lifecycle-manifest.json: writes, backups, idempotency, rollback, validation after install/init/update/repair/uninstall/bootstrap.

sections.title: Distribution zip packaging
sections.purpose: distribution-manifest.json, build-distribution.ps1, verify-distribution.ps1; include/exclude rules for portable packs.

sections.title: Cross-surface contract tests
sections.purpose: run-contract-tests.ps1 rules: manifests, docs commands, capabilities, gates, adapters, release evidence mapping, and strict-profile maturity.

sections.title: Safe apply for mutating scripts
sections.purpose: Dry-run, WhatIf, manifest writes/safeApply, invoke-safe-apply.ps1, and verify-script-manifest strict rules for writeRisk.

sections.title: Component maturity registry
sections.purpose: component-manifest.json tiers, verify-components.ps1 coverage and strict/release surface rules, allowlist.

sections.title: Operator journal (local)
sections.purpose: Gitignored OPERATOR_JOURNAL.md for audits, validation failures, and local notes; init-os-runtime creation; no secrets.

sections.title: Secret and credential lint
sections.purpose: verify-no-secrets.ps1: tracked .env, PEM blocks, provider key shapes, markdown examples, OS_WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.template.md, examples/, and .gitignore /logs/; warn vs strict.

sections.title: Runtime JSON Examples
sections.purpose: Representative validator and health envelopes, manifest fixtures, schema map, and verify-examples.

sections.title: Audit Evidence Export
sections.purpose: Sanitized export-audit-evidence bundle, manifest schema, privacy invariants, and parameters.

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.purpose: Common failures: Git, Bash on Windows, PowerShell version, adapter and skill drift, JSON schemas, runtime-release docs, generated files.

sections.title: Project Bootstrap (init-project)
sections.purpose: init-project.ps1 contract, .claude layout, adapters, decision log, and examples/project-bootstrap reference trees.

sections.title: Capabilities and intent routing
sections.purpose: os-capabilities vs capability-manifest routes, route-capability.ps1 usage, approval tiers, and required route ids.

sections.title: Manifest-governed quality gates
sections.purpose: quality-gates/*.json contracts, verify-quality-gates, evaluate-quality-gate, and release false-green rules.

sections.title: Release Readiness Evidence
sections.purpose: Strict validation commands, clean-state checklist, and optional JSONL evidence before merge or tag.

sections.title: Contract upgrades and migrations
sections.purpose: Human workflow and upgrade-manifest.json contract for documented schemaVersion bumps; verify-upgrade-notes gate.

sections.title: Human approval ledger
sections.purpose: Steward-class playbook sign-off via logs/approval-log.jsonl; append-approval-log and verify-approval-log; not used for routine os-validate.
